steps.html_instructions:
Head east on Bankole Oki St toward Mobolaji Johnson Ave
Pass by Olympia Entertainment (on the right)
steps.translated_text: Ori ila-oorun lori banki OLI St t Morolaji Johnson Ajesara nipasẹ Ormpia Eye (ni apa ọtun)

steps.html_instructions:
Turn left at Nigerian Communications Commission onto Mobolaji Johnson Ave
Pass by timelessaproko.com (on the left)
steps.translated_text: Yipada si apa osi ni Igbimọ Awọn ibaraẹnisọrọ Naijiria lori Molagi John JossonAss nipasẹ Timenetaproko.com (Ni apa osi)

steps.html_instructions:
Turn left at Vap Autos onto Glover Rd
Pass by Bureau Veritas Nigeria Limited (on the right)
steps.translated_text: Yipada si apa osi ni VAP Aup pẹlẹpẹlẹ Gdeau Vertas Nigeria Lopin (Lori ọtun)

steps.html_instructions:
Turn right onto Oba Adeyinka Oyekan Ave
Pass by Joseph Kolade Photography (on the left in 550m)
steps.translated_text: Yipada si ọtun lori Ora Era Caneyka Uolade

steps.html_instructions:
Turn left onto Osborne Rd
Pass by VTA Global Services (on the left in 350m)
steps.translated_text: Yipada si apa OSOLART Radtass nipasẹ VTA agbaye awọn iṣẹ (ni apa osi ni 350M)

steps.html_instructions: Take the ramp to 3rd Mainland Bridge
steps.translated_text: Mu afara ti o lọ si Bridland Hind
Dapọ lori Expoway1 / Oru Rd / E1

steps.html_instructions:
Keep left to continue on Expressway1/Third Mainland Brg/E1
Continue to follow Expressway1/E1
Pass by BUILDERS' HUB (on the right in 12.3 km)
steps.translated_text: Jeki osi lati tẹsiwaju lori Pregoway1 / E1Cantninue

steps.html_instructions:
Make a U-turn at LSE Km 0 Yard
Pass by Ikosi Road Emergency Point (on the right)
steps.translated_text: Ṣe U-Tan ni LSE KM 0 Kọgg nipasẹ aaye pajawiri ti Ikosi (Ni apa ọtun)

steps.html_instructions:
Slight right at Federal Road Safety Corps, Ojota command onto Ziatech Rd
Pass by Seven Up Staff Clinic (on the right)
steps.translated_text: Ọtun ọtun ni Forps Abo Spave, Ojata paṣẹ lori ile ile-iwosan ti o wa ni meje (ni apa ọtun)

steps.html_instructions:
Ziatech Rd turns right and becomes Mobolaji Johnson Ave
Pass by Legionhill Limited (on the left in 350m)
steps.translated_text: Zitech Rd yipada si ọtun ati di Sonkaji John Movepass nipasẹ Legionhill Lopin (ni apa osi ni 350M)

steps.html_instructions:
Turn right onto Senator Bola Ahmed Tinubu Way
Pass by Olowopopo (on the right)
steps.translated_text: Tan taara si ile-igbimọ Bola Bula Ahmed Tinubu Titigu

steps.html_instructions:
At the roundabout, take the 2nd exit onto Dr Nurudeen Olowopopo Way
Pass by BRT Bus station (on the right)
steps.translated_text: Ni iyipo, mu ijade keji si Dr Nudeen OlukopopoPo lepa nipasẹ ibudo ọkọ brt (ni apa ọtun)

steps.html_instructions:
Turn left onto M.K.O Abiola Gardens Rd
Pass by Easycuuk Concept Limited (on the right)
steps.translated_text: Yipada si apa osi M.k.O Abi Abiola Ọgba RDAPSATS nipasẹ Epo Eastuk Lopin (Lori ọtun)

steps.html_instructions:
Turn right at Ibknoni Enterprise onto Palm Ave
Restricted usage road
Destination will be on the left
steps.translated_text: Tan ọtun ni IBYnoni Idawọle Lori Ọpẹ-apo-apo-apolge ti o ga julọ yoo wa ni apa osi
